# Error code reference

All 351 `TQL-*` codes, scanned from the framework sources on every refresh and grouped by domain. The meaning is extracted from the raising site (its message text, with dynamic parts shown as `…`), the raising files are the provenance, and where a cookbook page discusses a code, it is linked. An undocumented code still appears — that is the point of an index.

[ACCOUNT](#account) · [ADM](#adm) · [APP](#app) · [ATTACH](#attach) · [BATCH](#batch) · [CAMEL](#camel) · [FIELD](#field) · [GOV](#gov) · [IAM](#iam) · [IDEM](#idem) · [LANE](#lane) · [LD](#ld) · [MCP](#mcp) · [OIDC](#oidc) · [OPS](#ops) · [PLAN](#plan) · [PLUGIN](#plugin) · [RATE](#rate) · [REPORT](#report) · [SCOPE](#scope) · [SEC](#sec) · [SQL](#sql) · [STUDIO](#studio) · [TENANT](#tenant) · [TPL](#tpl) · [UPGRADE](#upgrade) · [VIEW](#view) · [WORKFLOW](#workflow) · [YAML](#yaml)
